title: THE ECLIPSE CROWN
core_hook: A fallen princess wakes before her execution under a chained moon while her living crown whispers from inside her blood.
visual_promise: Dark royal fantasy, chained moon motif, gothic prison and palace architecture, black-silver eclipse magic, elegant faces, cinematic vertical panels.
reader_feeling: The reader should feel like they discovered a premium tragic regression manhwa with mystery, romance tension, power awakening, and court conspiracy.
